summary: Noah owns discovery for an AI workflow product but does not have a dedicated research partner. His team runs weekly customer calls, pulls signal from sales and support, and needs research artifacts that can influence roadmap decisions quickly.
personalization_hooks: Recently led a sprint review where customer evidence changed the roadmap priority.
Works with both sales-led enterprise feedback and hands-on user interviews.
Often has to defend qualitative findings to executives who want clear decision impact.
likely_pain_points: Translating scattered customer signal into a tighter next interview plan.
Knowing when qualitative evidence is strong enough to change roadmap direction.
Producing concise stakeholder-ready summaries from multiple conversations.
